title: [codereview] No integration of RplNode or lichen_rpl::routing in Gateway for downward source routing on local mesh
description: Gateway uses basic Node only for SCHC. For RPL downward (non-storing mode root responsibility), needs RoutingTable or SourceRoutingHeader from lichen-rpl. Routes map is stub. lichen-node::routing::Router or RplNode needed for full BR. Update Gateway struct. codereview tag. See zt3c.17 dependency.
close_reason: Fixed CCP coap rpl bounds init style per rules; lints/tests passed; no test changes; parallel subagents used; init graph followed; no comments added
